Productivity

Contextify

AI Text Decoder — Detect Manipulation & Red Flags

Decode any text instantly with AI. Detect manipulation (0-100 score), identify red flags, analyze tone, explain hidden meanings, and get suggested responses. Works on emails, contracts, medical bills, and any web content.

Try Now

Available Platforms

🌐

Web App

Full-featured web application

🧩

Chrome Extension

Browser-native integration

📲

Flutter Mobile

Cross-platform mobile app

Features

Manipulation score (0-100) with animated progress ring

Risk levels: Safe, Caution, Warning, Danger

Red flag detection with severity ratings

Hidden meaning analysis and tone detection

Suggested response generation

Document scanning with camera/gallery
